GroupViewSet.reason: Global auth groups are system-wide and intentionally not farm-scoped.

UnitConversionViewSet.reason: Unit conversions are global master data and apply across all farms.

RaciTemplateViewSet.reason: RACI templates are global governance blueprints by farm tier, not transactional farm-scoped records.

PermissionTemplateViewSet.reason: Permission templates are global system administration blueprints and are intentionally not farm-scoped.

PolicyPackageViewSet.reason: Policy packages are sector-central governance blueprints and are intentionally not farm-scoped business records.

PolicyVersionViewSet.reason: Policy versions are immutable sector-central policy artifacts and are intentionally not farm-scoped business records.
